title: haworthia scabra subsp. starkiana
intro: Haworthia scabra subsp. starkiana, also known as the rough haworthia, is a succulent plant species within the genus Haworthia, characterized by its unique, rough-textured leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may be attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming the plant has been reported to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. Traditionally, haworthia scabra subsp. starkiana has been used to prepare herbal remedies, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, which may be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
